summary: Tightened the chapter opening to pick up the prior chapter's promise of 'tomorrow' and hand off more cleanly into the Wash World timeskip without changing scene beats or characterization.
edits: Added a one-sentence bridge in the opening paragraph to connect chapter 17's final transition to the Wash World apartment.
Adjusted the following sentence from 'By the fourth week over Wash World' to 'By the fourth week there' to avoid repetition after the new bridge sentence.
